shot_prompts.prompt:
Create a premium vertical 9:16 ANIMATED finance video scene for Maven, an Indian stock market research brand.
Scene purpose: hook.
Visual concept: the single strongest scroll-stopping hero visual of the day's story — built around the motif: ascending data columns.
Motion style: rising camera glides, green glow pulses, upward parallax.
Camera movement: hard push-in that lands on the hero visual.
Aesthetic: premium financial newsroom, modern Indian stock market intelligence, cinematic data visualization, high-end dark finance aesthetic, clean market dashboard, elegant lighting, crisp depth, sophisticated motion graphics feel. Direction: Green Market Pulse — dark navy premium dashboard, green glowing cards, upward energy. Mood: confident, optimistic, premium. Palette accents: #0A1220, #27C281, #22D3EE. Motion language: rising camera glides, green glow pulses, upward parallax. Real continuous motion throughout — never a static frame, never a slideshow. Smooth, high-end, no chaotic movement, no morphing artifacts.
Important: No readable text. No fake numbers. No fake stock tickers. No fake company logos. No buy/sell arrows. No trading signal visuals. No clutter. No cartoon style. No meme style. No cheap AI look. Leave clean negative space for text overlays and subtitles.
Output: animated MP4 video clip, vertical 9:16, 2-4 seconds.
shot_prompts.negative_prompt: static image, still poster, slideshow, cheap Canva animation, cheap stock market video, random candlestick spam, low quality AI artifacts, fake numbers, readable nonsense text, fake logo, clutter, meme style, cartoon bull, cartoon bear, buy signal, sell signal, trading call, cluttered trading screen, overexposed, blurry, distorted, ugly text, distorted charts, watermark, 3D coins
